failure_modes.text: A system can optimize for fitness under pressure while drifting away from truth, happiness, or long-term design quality.
failure_modes.source_quote: selected based on maximizing survival or Darwinian fitness
failure_modes.mitigation: Check whether the system is optimizing for fitness under pressure or for the outcome you actually want; survival and truth are not always aligned.

failure_modes.text: False pattern recognition reuses an old survival heuristic on a genuinely novel problem.
failure_modes.mitigation: Test old survival heuristics against the current environment; false pattern recognition reuses evolutionary shortcuts on genuinely novel problems.

failure_modes.text: Fatalism creeps in when people say this is how the system selects behavior and stop redesigning incentives.
failure_modes.source_quote: this is how people are wired
failure_modes.mitigation: Redesign incentives rather than accepting selection pressure as fate; fatalism stops teams from engineering better outcomes.

premortem_questions.text: What is this system currently rewarding, and what behavior is it selecting against even if no one admits it?
premortem_questions.source_quote: what the system is rewarding, what it is selecting against

premortem_questions.text: If this plan succeeds, what second-order consequences will selection pressure create three or more steps out?
premortem_questions.source_quote: three, six, and twelve months down the line

premortem_questions.text: What would happen if we applied a different disciplinary frame instead of the first survival story that came to mind?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What would happen if I applied a frame from a completely different discipline?

heuristics.text: Package decisions and communication in a way the pressure-shaped audience can actually process.
heuristics.source_quote: simple, clear, visual, novel, and non-threatening

heuristics.text: Look at what survives competition, stress, and resource constraints rather than what merely sounds right in theory.
heuristics.source_quote: systems adapt around pressure, not around ideals

heuristics.text: Use worst-case checks to keep tail-risk blindness from hiding behind base-case comfort.
heuristics.source_quote: Is the worst case bad enough?

curation_notes.summary: Chunk set stays close to the source's strongest failure modes, premortem questions, and repeatable heuristics.
donor_drops: Did not widen the chunk surface beyond clearly source-backed failure, premortem, and heuristic material.
open_questions: Some chunk text is compressed for operational reuse, but each item stays traceable to explicit source language.

allies: Relation-rich ally material was left for Wave 3 instead of being smuggled into chunk text.
antagonists: Bias and conflict material stronger as first-order relations was deferred to Wave 3.
structured_tensions: Any higher-order candidacy remains observational only in batch artifacts.
